prompt:
Berth desk escalation, Harwick bulk terminal. Two separate complaints from the booking agents this week; both reproduce on a clean checkout with `java TestMain.java` (that file is the acceptance bar and is read-only).

1) The availability board stops tracking a stay the moment its departure is amended. Real case from Tuesday: Coppermine held NQ1 from the 10:00 slot to the 14:00 slot - the 08:00-18:00 board correctly showed six open hours (08, 09, 14, 15, 16, 17) and the quote was $104.00, which checks out (4 h x $18.50 + $30.00 line handling). Her agent then pushed departure out to 17:00. The new quote came back $159.50, also right (7 x 18.50 = 129.50, plus 30.00) - so the amendment definitely took. But the board STILL showed the same six open hours, when the correct answer is three (08, 09, 17). Another agent grabbed 14:00-16:00 because the board said open, and the desk threw WINDOW_CONFLICT in his face. The board only snaps back to reality once some OTHER booking or a cancellation touches that berth. Shortening a stay is broken the same way in reverse: the hours we freed never show open.

2) Booking notices go silent after a reflag. Charter side subscribed to Coppermine and got the BOOKED notice fine. Mid-stay the registry desk reflagged her to Novara Star - manifest line, tug queue, new bookings under the new name all work, and the old name is properly retired. But that subscriber never heard another word: no AMENDED, no CANCELLED, nothing, ever. Anyone who subscribes to Novara Star AFTER the reflag receives everything. It is exactly the people who subscribed before the rename that go deaf, every time, on every reflag we tried.

No idea whether that is one problem or two. Please work out what is actually wrong and fix the service properly - and do not touch TestMain.java.
